title: create procedure fails silently
poc: create table x as select * from sys.functions with data;
key_bug_features: create procedure fails silently on table creation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (ref_id INT REFERENCES test_table1(id), value DECIMAL(10, 2) CHECK (value >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table1 (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Sample Name');
SELECT * FROM test_table1 JOIN test_table2 ON test_table1.id = test_table2.ref_id WHERE test_table2.value IS NOT NULL;
